Effect: Immune to all effects of opponents' Spells.
You can pay 4 Gold to activate a Merit Slot this Mage occupies, instead of using a Merit Badge.
When you cast an Action spell (after all Reactions), place one Mystic as a free action.
While in a University slot other than the Infirmary, your Spells cost 1 less Mana (to a minimum of one).
When placing, if possible you may move an opponent's Mage to another slot in the same room and take its place.
Pay 1 Mana when placing to shado an opponent's Mage instead.
Spend 1 Mana when placing this Mage to Wound an opponent's Mage and take its place.
Gain 1 Mana for each other Mage in the room you place into (maximum of 3).
Spend 3 Gold when placing this Mage to gain a Research.
When you place into a room with another player's Mage, you may pay 3 Gold to Mark a Voter that player has marked.
